# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
  agent any

  options {
    timestamps()
    disableConcurrentBuilds()
    ansiColor('xterm')
    buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '30'))
  }

  parameters {
    choice(
      name: 'SHELL',
      choices: ['bash', 'sh', 'zsh'],
      description: 'Shell interpreter used to run the provided commands.'
    )

    booleanParam(
      name: 'FAIL_ON_EMPTY',
      defaultValue: true,
      description: 'Fail the build if a required command is empty.'
    )

    booleanParam(
      name: 'DRY_RUN',
      defaultValue: false,
      description: 'If enabled, commands are printed but not executed.'
    )

    text(
      name: 'PREPARE_CMDS',
      defaultValue: '''set -euo pipefail
echo "Prepare: $(date)"
''',
      description: 'Commands to prepare the workspace/environment.'
    )

    text(
      name: 'BUILD_CMDS',
      defaultValue: '''set -euo pipefail
echo "Build step: $(date)"
''',
      description: 'Commands to build the project (e.g., mvn package, gradle build, npm run build).'
    )

    text(
      name: 'TEST_CMDS',
      defaultValue: '''set -euo pipefail
echo "Test step: $(date)"
''',
      description: 'Commands to run tests (e.g., mvn test, pytest, npm test).'
    )

    text(
      name: 'DEPLOY_CMDS',
      defaultValue: '''set -euo pipefail
echo "Deploy step: $(date)"
''',
      description: 'Commands to deploy (e.g., kubectl apply, helm upgrade, scp/ssh).'
    )

    text(
      name: 'POST_CMDS',
      defaultValue: '''set -euo pipefail
echo "Post step: $(date)"
''',
      description: 'Commands to run after all steps (cleanup, notifications, etc.).'
    )
  }

  environment {
    PIPELINE_SHELL = "${params.SHELL}"
  }

  stages {
    stage('Checkout') {
      steps {
        checkout scm
      }
    }

    stage('Prepare') {
      steps {
        script {
          runUserCommands('PREPARE_CMDS', params.PREPARE_CMDS, true)
        }
      }
    }

    stage('Build') {
      steps {
        script {
          runUserCommands('BUILD_CMDS', params.BUILD_CMDS, true)
        }
      }
    }

    stage('Test') {
      steps {
        script {
          runUserCommands('TEST_CMDS', params.TEST_CMDS, true)
        }
      }
    }

    stage('Deploy') {
      when {
        expression { return (params.DEPLOY_CMDS ?: '').trim() }
      }
      steps {
        script {
          runUserCommands('DEPLOY_CMDS', params.DEPLOY_CMDS, false)
        }
      }
    }

    stage('Post') {
      steps {
        script {
          runUserCommands('POST_CMDS', params.POST_CMDS, false)
        }
      }
    }
  }

  post {
    always {
      echo "Build finished: ${currentBuild.currentResult}"
    }
  }
}

def runUserCommands(String label, String cmds, boolean required) {
  String content = (cmds ?: '').trim()

  if (!content) {
    if (required && (params.FAIL_ON_EMPTY as boolean)) {
      error("${label} is empty and FAIL_ON_EMPTY is enabled.")
    }
    echo "${label} is empty; skipping."
    return
  }

  String scriptBody = content.endsWith("\n") ? content : (content + "\n")

  if (params.DRY_RUN as boolean) {
    echo "DRY_RUN enabled. Would run (${env.PIPELINE_SHELL}) ${label}:\n---\n${scriptBody}---"
    return
  }

  if (env.PIPELINE_SHELL == 'bash') {
    sh(label: label, script: """#!/usr/bin/env bash
${scriptBody}
""")
  } else if (env.PIPELINE_SHELL == 'zsh') {
    sh(label: label, script: """#!/usr/bin/env zsh
${scriptBody}
""")
  } else {
    sh(label: label, script: """#!/usr/bin/env sh
${scriptBody}
""")
  }
}
